posts.text:
Great dinner tonight with Kjirstin @HydroGraphInc and @AubreyMarcus 

Tomorrow, I’ll be recording a podcast with Aubrey, who’s lived in Austin for 31 years. 

We have a lot of similar interests and goals we will be discussing.  Key shared passion is how we will make the world a better place with turbostratic fractal graphene.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
